ItacAcademyItem.Name: Abbagliati (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: According to Maylender, the Abbagliati Academy was created in 1650 in one Marini`s house at San Moise` by Girolamo Brusoni of Legnago.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
